mood: hushed, ceremonial, nocturnal, charged with withheld motion
lighting: low theatrical side-light with a single overexposed bone-white flare grazing the surface and leaving the surrounding field nearly unlit
object_inventory: small vellum apertures carrying track-name whispers
graphite scars and edge tears along the flare path
isolated silver flecks arranged like a slow listening score
